calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court stated that it had no further questions regarding distribution. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary Wiss. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
